message:
fix: protect standing-order beads from polecat removal status reset

When a polecat is removed, unassignWorkBeads resets all its hooked
beads to status=open. This was flipping standing-order beads (like
pr-sheriff) from hooked→open, making them vulnerable to AutoClose.

Add IsProtectedBead() helper that checks for gt:standing-orders,
gt:keep, gt:role, and gt:rig labels. Polecat removal now skips
protected beads, preserving their status and assignee.

This was the missing link in the bead disappearance chain:
polecat removed → hooked→open → AutoClose after 7 days → purge

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
